song.title: Lord Thou Hast Won
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1 Lord, Thou hast won, At length I yield; My heart by mighty grace compelled Surrenders all to Thee; Against Thy terrors long I strove, But who can stand against Thy love? Love conquers even me.
[V2] 2) But since Thou hast Thy love revealed, And shown my soul a pardon sealed, I can resist no more: Could’st Thou for such a sinner bleed? Can’st Thou for such a rebel plead? I wonder and adore!
[V3] 3) If Thou hadst bid Thy thunders roll, And light’nings flash, to blast my soul, I still had stubborn been; But mercy has my heart subdued, A bleeding Savior I have viewed, And now I hate my sin.
[V4] 4) Now, Lord, I would be Thine alone, Come, take possession of Thine own, For Thou hast set me free; Released from Satan’s hard command, See all my powers waiting stand, To be employed by Thee.
song.author: John Newton
